g.text: Attention scores | can reach 50-100 | without scaling!
Scaling by sqrt(d_k) keeps scores in safe range

div.p: Key Insight: Subtracting the max does not change the output! $$\text{softmax}(x_i) = \frac{e^{x_i}}{\sum_j e^{x_j}} = \frac{e^{x_i - m}}{\sum_j e^{x_j - m}}$$ where $m = \max(x)$ Proof: Factor out $e^m$ from numerator and denominator: $$\frac{e^{x_i}}{\sum_j e^{x_j}} = \frac{e^{m} \cdot e^{x_i - m}}{e^{m} \cdot \sum_j e^{x_j - m}} = \frac{e^{x_i - m}}{\sum_j e^{x_j - m}}$$ The $e^m$ factors cancel out!
